mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resource_page_element (
id,
create_time, update_time,
application_id, page_code, page_element_name, page_element_code,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pageElementName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pageElementCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO resource_page_element (
id,
create_time, update_time,
application_id, page_code, page_element_name, page_element_code,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.pageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pageElementName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pageElementCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE resource_page_element
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
application_id = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
page_code = #{pageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
page_element_name = #{pageElementName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
page_element_code = #{pageElementCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE resource_page_element
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
application_id = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
page_code = #{pageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
page_element_name = #{pageElementName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
page_element_code = #{pageElementCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE resource_page_element
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
application_id, page_code, page_element_name, page_element_code,
delete_flag,
version FROM resource_page_element WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
application_id, page_code, page_element_name, page_element_code,
delete_flag,
version FROM resource_page_element

SELECT t.id, t.application_id, t.page_code, t.page_element_name, t.page_element_code, t.status FROM ( SELECT rpe.id, rpe.application_id, rpe.page_code, rpe.page_element_name, rpe.page_element_code, curr.status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY rpe.id ORDER BY CASE curr.status WHEN 'ENABLED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) AS rn FROM user_role_relation urr JOIN role_control_unit_relation rcur ON urr.`role_id` = rcur.`role_id` AND rcur.`delete_flag` = 0 AND rcur.`status` = 'ACTIVATED' JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON rcur.`control_unit_id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'PAGE_ELEMENT' JOIN resource_page_element rpe ON curr.`resource_id` = rpe.`id` AND rpe.`delete_flag` = 0 AND rpe.`application_id` = #{applicationId} WHERE urr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND urr.`user_id` = #{userId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1

SELECT t.id, t.application_id, t.page_code, t.page_element_name, t.page_element_code, t.status FROM ( SELECT rpe.id, rpe.application_id, rpe.page_code, rpe.page_element_name, rpe.page_element_code, curr.status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY rpe.id ORDER BY CASE curr.status WHEN 'ENABLED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) AS rn FROM control_unit cu JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON cu.`id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'PAGE_ELEMENT' JOIN resource_page_element rpe ON curr.`resource_id` = rpe.`id` AND rpe.`delete_flag` = 0 WHERE cu.delete_flag = 0 AND cu.`landing` = 1 AND cu.`control_unit_scope` = 'PERPETUAL' AND cu.`status` = 'PUBLISHED' AND cu.`application_id` = #{applicationId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1
